title: InlineCitation
description: Defines the structure of an inline citation embedded in text fields. Raw form: {{cite|<ref_id>|<pages>|<quotations>}}. The integrity check parses each cite tag and validates the result against this schema.

ref_id.description: Must match an id in the record's references array.

quotations.description: One or more verbatim quotations from the cited pages. Displayed as tooltip on the UI. In the raw cite tag, entries are separated by a semicolon between the closing page-ref parenthesis and the next opening quote: "text" (p. N);"text" (pp. N-M). Semicolons inside quotation text are allowed.

quotation_entry.description: A single verbatim quotation with its own page reference. Raw form: "<text>" (<page>).

text.description: Verbatim text from the source, without surrounding quotes.

page.description: Page reference for this specific quotation. Examples: 'p. 85', 'pp. 102-103'.
